name: SIMM Tablir
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand, then target 1 Level 4 Cyberse monster in your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand to your zone a linked Link Monster you control points to, and if you do, return the targeted monster to the hand. You can only use this effect of "SIMM Tablir" once per turn.
